archive_data.question_text: Which of the following State Governments organises Surajkund Mela every year?

explanation.english: The Surajkund Mela is an annual cultural fair organized by the Haryana Tourism Department. It is held in Faridabad, Haryana, to showcase traditional Indian handicrafts and arts.
explanation.tanglish: Surajkund Mela endra varushaarithaa anaitha kalai表现um Haryana Tourism aal nadathapadum oar pana kaatchi. Idhu Faridabad, Haryana vil nadakum, Bharatha kalai微观um kai thari panpaadugalai kaattum.

archive_data.question_text: The Wazir (minister) of ________ built Moth ki Masjid in Delhi.

explanation.english: Moth ki Masjid was built in 1505 by Miyan Bhoiya, the Wazir (minister) of Sultan Sikandar Lodi of the Delhi Sultanate. It is located in South Delhi.
explanation.tanglish: Moth ki Masjid 1505-aam aandil Sultan Sikandar Lodi-yin mantri Miyan Bhoiya kattina palli. Idhu Delhi Sultanate kaalathu palli, Therku Delhi-yil ullathu.

archive_data.question_text: Which is the most common tidal pattern?

explanation.english: Semi-diurnal tides are the most common tidal pattern worldwide, occurring twice daily with two high tides and two low tides of approximately equal height.
explanation.tanglish: Semi-diurnal katal alaiyadal, ulagil mikachum parambaraiyaana murai. Ithu naatkil irandu murai, irandu uyaramana neer nilaiyum irandu kadum neer nilaiyum varum.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following dance forms belongs to the Vaishnava Monasteries of North East India?

explanation.english: Sattriya is a classical dance form that originated in the Vaishnava monasteries (sattras) of Assam in North East India during the 15th century.
explanation.tanglish: Sattriya endra Bharatha naatiyam, Vadakkum Ku-India, Assam Vaishnava muttugalil (sattras) 15-teenth century-il arambithathu.

archive_data.question_text: How many tiers of government are mentioned in the Constitution of India?

explanation.english: The Constitution of India provides for a three-tier government structure: Union (Central) Government, State Government, and Local Government (Panchayats and Municipalities).
explanation.tanglish: India Arasiyal Payal 73rd and 74th Amendment-il varuthappaatta, moondu thanthith thala arasu: Kenda Arasu, Maanilam Arasu, and Sthal Arasu (Panchayat, Nagaratchi).

archive_data.question_text: When did the Paris Agreement on Climate Change come into force (become effective from)?

explanation.english: The Paris Agreement was adopted on 12th December 2015 and entered into force on 4th November 2016 after ratification by sufficient countries.
explanation.tanglish: Paris Oppantham 12th December 2015-il eduthukkappattathu, 4th November 2016-il sariyaana nadugal ratification koduthaka amalukku vandhathu.

archive_data.question_text: Who among the following is associated with the Mridangam instrument?

explanation.english: Palghat Mani Iyer was a legendary Carnatic music Mridangam player from Kerala, considered one of the greatest Mridangam maestros in Indian classical music history.
explanation.tanglish: Palghat Mani Iyer, Kerala moolathavar, Karnatic sangeethathil Mridangam vaasithavar. Ivan Bharatha sangeetha varalaaril miga prasiddha Mridangam machaasthro.
